title: The EBA consults on amendments to the RTS on the assignment of risk weights to specialised lending exposures under the Supervisory Slotting Criteria Approach
summary: L'EBA aggiorna i criteri di ponderazione del rischio per esposizioni creditizie specializzate, impattando la gestione del rischio e la conformità normativa delle banche.

title: The ESA’s Joint Committee highlights digitalisation, cyber resilience and sustainable finance as key priorities of 2025
summary: Le autorità di vigilanza europea stabiliscono priorità 2025 su resilienza operativa e cyber, implementando DORA per rafforzare gestione rischi ICT e terze parti.

title: The EBA amends Guidelines on the definition of default
summary: L'EBA modifica le Linee Guida sulla definizione di insolvenza, impattando la gestione del rischio creditizio e i requisiti prudenziali delle banche.

title: The EBA publishes its final Guidelines on supervisory independence
summary: L'EBA stabilisce linee guida sulla indipendenza dei supervisori per prevenire conflitti di interesse del personale e dei vertici delle autorità competenti.

title: The EBA streamlines its Guidelines on connected clients to align with new EU legislation
summary: L'EBA elimina sezioni delle linee guida sui clienti connessi per allinearsi alla nuova legislazione UE direttamente applicabile alle banche.

title: The EBA responds to the Commission’s proposed changes to its draft technical standards on operational risk
summary:
# ANALYSIS

This article concerns EBA's Opinion on Commission amendments to RTS on operational risk under CRR. The core subject is **capital requirements for operational risk** - a foundational prudential regulation for banking institutions.

**Assessment against the Critical Legal Filter:**

The article addresses operational risk requirements under CRR, which encompasses:
- Risk management frameworks
- Internal governance and control structures
- Third-party dependencies and outsourcing arrangements
- ICT risk management (as operational risk includes technology failures)
- Supervisory capital adequacy standards
